ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate dataset */,
  "variables" TEXT /* Variables included in the dataset */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Starting date of the dataset */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Ending date of the dataset */,
  "climo_available" TEXT /* Availability of climatological data for certain years */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the dataset */,
  "spatial_resolution" TEXT /* Spatial resolution of the dataset */,
  "temporal_resolution" TEXT /* Temporal resolution of the dataset */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the dataset is updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable measured (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climo_data" (
  "climo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for climatological availability record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset this record pertains to */,
  "year_range" TEXT /* Year range for which climatological data is available */,
  "climo_type" TEXT /* Type of climatological data available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climo_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this documentation refers to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation (e.g., paper, guide) */,
  "doc_link" TEXT /* Link to the documentation */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the documentation */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guide */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this guide pertains to */,
  "guide_name" TEXT /* Name of the guide */,
  "guide_link" TEXT /* Link to the guide */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the guide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guides_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action taken by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., NOAA, NASA) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_sources" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each linking record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship between the dataset and the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sources_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset (e.g., v1.0) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
